title: The Cantor's Son
actors: Moyshe Oysher, Florence Weiss, Judith Abarbanel
plot: This musical drama marks the screen debut of Moishe Oysher, in a film critic J. Hoberman calls an "anti-Jazz Singer." Oysher stars as a wayward youth who makes his way from his Polish shtetl to New York's Lower East Side where he ...
